REMARK: AS TO THE AUGUST-25-2025 PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT; THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. =(301/HEK)

REMARK: HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT WAS HELD. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE EX PARTE APPLICATION IS DENIED BY COURT. THE EX PARTE APPLICATION WAS NOT NOT PROPERLY SERVED.
